business.headline: Maersk places fresh order for 1,000 India-made shipping containersThe announcement came as Union Minister of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Sarbananda Sonowal, unveiled the first export-import (EXIM) shipping container manufactured in India for the company at the Maersk-CONCOR Inland Container Depot in UP's Dadri.

E20 even powers F1 cars: Auto experts dismiss concerns, back govt amid backlashIndustry experts defended the rollout of E20 fuel, saying extensive testing found no concerns in compatible vehicles. They said the ethanol push is tied to lower emissions, defined standards and reduced oil dependence.

Carlsberg eyes India stock market listing; confidential IPO filing submittedCarlsberg said it has confidentially filed for an IPO of its Indian business. The proposed listing would allow a partial stake sale, subject to approvals and market conditions.

ITR 2026: Do you need to file two income tax returns? Tax department explainsThe new Income-tax Act has changed the way taxpayers talk about return filing, replacing "Assessment Year" with "Tax Year". But does that mean you'll have to file two ITRs? Here's what the tax department says.

Sensex, Nifty end higher on IT rally; HCLTech surges nearly 6%The BSE Sensex rose 261.79 points, or 0.34%, to settle at 77,763.91, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 95.15 points, or 0.39%, to close at 24,270.85.

IRDAI is finally going after the real reason behind insurance mis-sellingIRDAI is discussing a shift from upfront commissions to staggered payouts with the insurance industry. The proposed changes target mis-selling incentives and could tighten disclosure across distributors.

New EPFO Scheme: Will your employer contribute only Rs 1,800 to PF?The new EPFO Scheme, 2026 has raised an important question among salaried employees: will employers now limit their PF contribution to just Rs 1,800 a month? Here's what the new rules actually say.

Over Rs 9,300 crore lies unclaimed in 31 lakh EPF accounts, enough to build 3 IITsAn RTI response revealed that Rs 9,330 crore remains unclaimed in 30.91 lakh inoperative EPF accounts across India. The disclosure comes as the new EPF Scheme, 2026 takes effect, while details on Aadhaar-linked and high-value accounts remain undisclosed.

Planning to buy a plot in Noida? Read this Noida Authority warning firstThe Noida Authority has warned people against buying or selling land under specified khasra numbers in three villages. It said the parcels are acquired or notified land where illegal construction could bring financial and legal trouble.

Missed your EMI by a day? Here's how it can affect your credit scoreDid you miss your EMI by a day and instantly worry about your CIBIL score? Before you panic, here's what actually happens behind the scenes.

AI mega deal: Why HCLTech shares jump nearly 6% today?At around 11 am, HCLTech was trading nearly 6% higher. The rally also helped lift the broader Nifty IT index for the second straight session, even as AI-heavy markets in South Korea and Taiwan witnessed a sharp selloff.

Air India cuts fuel surcharge on North America, Europe flights as oil easesAir India has reduced temporary fuel surcharges on select long-haul routes from July 1. The move follows easing oil prices after the West Asia conflict had pushed up operating costs.
Sensex opens 400 points higher, Nifty above 24,300; HCLTech up 4%The BSE Sensex rose 507 points to 78,009.37, while the NSE Nifty50 gained nearly 170 points to trade at 24,346.25 in early trading.

Is the EPFO portal working today? Here's what PF subscribers should knowEPFO has said member and employer services are expected to resume from July 3 after another maintenance extension. The prolonged upgrade has delayed PF claims, passbook access and compliance tasks for nearly a week.

Zero tax in Form 16? You may still have to file an ITR. Here's whyEven if your employer has deducted no income tax because you qualify for the rebate under Section 87A, you may still be legally required to file an ITR in several situations.

EPF Scheme 2026: What employees and employers need to knowWith around eight crore active EPFO subscribers, the government hopes the updated scheme will make provident fund management simpler, more efficient and better suited to a digital-first workplace.

Will petrol, diesel prices be cut? Hardeep Puri says here's when it's possiblePuri explained that although international crude oil prices have fallen in recent weeks, oil companies are still refining crude that was purchased when prices were much higher during the West Asia conflict.

Centre eyes LIC, PSU stake sales to cushion strain from oil crisis: ReportThe Centre is speeding up stake sales in LIC, Hindustan Zinc and other state-run firms. The move is aimed at creating fiscal room as oil price volatility pressures government finances.

Sensex jumps 579 points as IT stocks shine; Nifty closes above 24,175The BSE Sensex climbed 579.48 points, or 0.75%, to close at 77,502.12, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 169.85 points, or 0.71%, to settle at 24,175.70.

AI rally cracks: Why Asian markets are crashing while Indian IT stocks rallyAsian chip stocks slumped after reports stoked fears of excess AI computing capacity. Indian IT shares, more tied to software spending, rose as investors weighed a different AI demand story.

entertainment.headline: Salman Khan roots for Sohail as he storms into Alliance as wild card contestant Actor Salman Khan cheered for brother Sohail Khan as he entered Prime Video's Alliance as a wild card contestant. On the show, Sohail opened up about showing his real self and stepping out of his comfort zone.

Actor Sumona Chakravarti reveals endometriosis surgery, shares moving note Actor Sumona Chakravarti revealed that she underwent surgery after her endometriosis progressed despite years of managing the condition. In a heartfelt Instagram post, she also opened up about recovery, online trolling and finding a new purpose on social media.

Karan Johar backs Alpha amid trolling, praises Alia Bhatt's theatrical pull Filmmaker Karan Johar has come out in support of Alia Bhatt's Alpha amid online trolling. He praised the actor's theatrical pull and urged audiences to celebrate big-screen cinema instead of spreading negativity.

Celina Jaitly says divorce notice came as anniversary gift: Twins read it Actor Celina Jaitly said her twin sons read out a divorce notice served in Austria before her 15th wedding anniversary. She said the episode led to a separation, custody dispute, financial strain and her return to India.

Singer Bismil alleges Rs 5 crore extortion bid from gangster: What we know so far Delhi-based singer Bismil has alleged that Haryana gangster Deepak Nandal demanded Rs 5 crore and threatened to kill him. The Delhi Police Special Cell has registered an FIR and launched an investigation.

Preity Zinta stood like a rock: Celina Jaitly recalls painful comeback to India Celina Jaitly said actor Preity Zinta stood by her when she returned to India amid a marital crisis. The actor said that support, along with temple visits, helped her rebuild and reconnect with her roots.

Peddi OTT release: When and where to watch Ram Charan's blockbuster sports drama Ram Charan's Peddi will begin streaming on Netflix after a strong theatrical run. Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, the hit film also stars Janhvi Kapoor and Divyenndu in key roles.

Inside Taylor's wedding: Gigi Hadid, Selena to Millie Brown, A-list guests depart Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding brought together some of Hollywood's biggest names. Here's a look at the celebrity guests, including Tom Brady, Selena Gomez and Gigi Hadid, as they were seen leaving the celebrations.

Lock Upp: Why Harshad Chopda's remark on gay men is bigger than any reality TV row Harshad Chopda's remarks about gay men on Lock Upp have triggered criticism online. The row has widened into a debate on homophobia, accountability and the show's response.

So Ji-sub's Agent Kim Reactivated becomes 2026's biggest K-drama The newly released K-drama Agent Kim Reactivated has rapidly become 2026's highest-rated Korean show. Featuring So Ji-sub's stellar performance, the series is garnering strong viewership and global buzz.

Salman Khan's Maatrubhumi not facing certification delay, clarify makers Maatrubhumi's makers have denied reports that the film has hit a CBFC hurdle. The statement shifts attention to the film's pending certification submission and unresolved release date.

Actor Chandrachur Singh reacts as bulldozer reaches his Gurugram home Officials demolished a ramp outside actor Chandrachur Singh's Gurugram home during a DLF drive against illegal structures. The actor's calm exchange with the team went viral as the department said more action will follow.

Swifties can't keep calm after Taylor Swift's wedding. Here's how fans reacted Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in a grand ceremony at Madison Square Garden as fans tracked every update online. The billboard reveal, Dior outfits and celebrity guest list drove a fresh wave of reactions across social media.

Alpha box office Day 1: Alia Bhatt's spy thriller opens bigger than Raazi, Jigra Alia Bhatt and Sharvari's Alpha had a decent opening day at the box office, with collections nearing the Rs 10 crore benchmark in India and Rs 16 crore worldwide. Check the detailed business report.

Samay Raina laughs off Sunil Pal's Rs 25 lakh claim, calls it fake news Samay Raina has denied Sunil Pal's claim that he offered him Rs 25 lakh for India's Got Latent. The exchange has reignited their public feud as the show's second season rolls on.

Taylor Swift's 'first wedding photos' go viral, fans aren't convinced A purported first wedding photo of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce surfaced online after the JusT&T Married announcement. Fans questioned whether the image was real, while some suggested it may have been AI-generated.

India watched Game of Thrones and HOTD. Is it ready for incest on big screen? Shows like Game of Thrones and House of the Dragon have made incest a recurring storytelling device that audiences have accepted as fiction. But could a similar narrative ever find a place in Indian theatres? Filmmakers explain why the answer is far more complicated.

Blake Lively skipped Taylor Swift's wedding. Here's where she was Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds missed Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding and rehearsal dinner. Their absence came as Swift and Lively's friendship remained strained amid the Justin Baldoni legal dispute.

No bridesmaids, no groomsmen at Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce's wedding Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce skipped traditional bridesmaids and groomsmen, choosing to have only their siblings stand by them at their Madison Square Garden wedding. The couple's celebration put family at the heart of their big day.

general news.headline: Traitors, join BJP and fight me: Mamata Banerjee's blistering attack on rebelsMamata Banerjee attacked the rebel TMC faction, accused it of working with the BJP and vowed to hold the July 21 rally. Her remarks underlined a fight for control of the party as resignations, symbol claims and defections intensified the crisis.

2 terrorists killed in encounter with security forces in J&K's ShopianAccording to sources, the gunfight broke out around 7:45 pm in Chanpora village after security forces launched a coordinated anti-terror operation in the area.

PRY vs FRA Live: Les Bleus look to make quick work of ParaguayParaguay vs France live score and updates, FIFA World Cup 2026: France will look to book their place in the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals against a defensive-minded Paraguay, with Didier Deschamps handing Manu Kone a start in place of the injured Aurelien Tchouameni. The winners will face Morocco in the last eight.

Morocco shakes off first-half slumber, ends Canada's dream run to reach quartersCanada vs Morocco, FIFA World Cup Round of 16: Azzedine Ounahi struck twice before Soufiane Rahimi added a late third as Morocco shook off a sluggish first half to beat Canada 3-0, ending the co-hosts' historic World Cup run and booking a second straight quarter-final berth.

How Mysore's Hyder Ali and Tipu Sultan helped America gain IndependenceAs the US marks 250 years since its Declaration of Independence, here's why Hyder Ali and Tipu Sultan, the rulers of India's Mysore, were admired in America during its war of independence against Britain. This is how the war in Mysore stretched British power, which played a decisive role in the American War of Independence.

Police asking us to limit E20 protest, we'll expose govt lies: Tehseen PoonawallaOrganisers of Sunday's anti-E20 protest at Jantar Mantar say that the Delhi Police, while giving verbal permission, has imposed a 200-person cap. Entrepreneur Tehseen Poonwalla, who is leading the agitation, has criticised the cops' decision and also warned to expose lies by government-backed auto industry experts.

Jacob Bethell spoils Sooryavanshi debut party, hands T20 champions third loss-in-a-rowIND vs ENG: Jacob Bethell's unbeaten 76 took England past India's 190 in Manchester after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's record debut. The chase exposed India's middle-overs slowdown and gave England a 1-0 lead in the five-match series.

250 years of American experiment: What the semi quincentennial means for diasporaAs America marks 250 years of independence, three Indian-American leaders reflect on its ideals and future. Their views show how the diaspora is helping shape the country's next chapter.

A 14,500-km monster wave is crossing the Pacific, and El Nino is backA monster wave of warm water close to 14,500 km across is crossing the Pacific, tracked by Nasa's Sentinel-6 satellite. Noaa has declared El Nino, with a 63 per cent chance it turns very strong by winter.

Iga Swiatek on shock exit after losing to Alexandra Eala: S**t happensDefending champion Iga Swiatek's Wimbledon title defence ended in stunning fashion after a straight-sets defeat to Alexandra Eala, with the Pole admitting that she struggled in the big moments.

Netanyahu knows who is boss: Trump says Israeli PM requested White House meetDonald Trump says Benjamin Netanyahu has sought a White House meeting that could happen as early as next week, even as reports point to growing tensions between the two leaders over the Middle East.

J&K schoolbook draws outrage for 'glorifying' terrorists, separatistsA book allegedly approved for government school libraries in Jammu and Kashmir has triggered outrage over its content, with claims it praises terrorists and separatists, setting off demands for a ban and a high-level investigation.

Celina Jaitly says divorce notice came as anniversary gift: Twins read itActor Celina Jaitly said her twin sons read out a divorce notice served in Austria before her 15th wedding anniversary. She said the episode led to a separation, custody dispute, financial strain and her return to India.

Agra woman spiked husband's kheer with sleeping pills, buried body in bathroomSurendra Kumar Sharma had been missing since May 18, and what initially appeared to be a routine missing person case soon began to take a darker turn. The family initially told police he had left home after a dispute, while his wife, Ruby, maintained that he had gone missing mysteriously and would return.

Days after fire at businessman's house, video shows him setting sofa ablazeA viral video has shifted the Ghaziabad house fire case from an apparent accident to a police probe. Investigators are now checking whether the blaze was deliberately started amid a family dispute.

Why Bhutan has declined E20 petrol offer from IndiaBhutan has declined offers from Indian oil companies to supply E20 petrol. The development comes at a time when India's E20 petrol mandate has sparked widespread debate over its impact on vehicle performance and mileage.

No building, zero beds, yet 87 staff: Indore's hospital that exists only on paperA delay in building Indore's proposed Khajrana Civil Hospital has sparked a political row after staff postings continued. The government says employees were adjusted elsewhere pending land allotment, while the Congress has demanded an inquiry.
Question Time: Weekly News QuizThink you read the headlines this week? Let's test that!

Woman travelling in Mumbai local at 12:30 am shares why she doesn't feel unsafeIn an Instagram video, a woman described feeling at ease while moving around Mumbai after midnight. Her remarks sparked a wider conversation on women's safety, public transport and the city's late-night atmosphere.

Monsoon fury: Extremely heavy rain to lash these states on SundayThe IMD has warned of extremely heavy rainfall over Gujarat, Odisha, Konkan and Maharashtra on July 5 as a well-marked low-pressure area moves inland from the Bay of Bengal. Delhi is set for light rain, thunderstorms and below-normal temperatures.

Nasa's Swift telescope is falling from the sky. Its robot rescuer just phoned homeKatalyst Space has established contact with LINK after its launch to orbit for Nasa's Swift rescue mission. The milestone clears the way for a first-of-its-kind attempt to raise the ageing telescope's orbit.

Wedding jo hone nahi wali: Siya Goyal's Snapchat text to friend goes viralA purported screenshot of a Snapchat chat allegedly involving Siya Goyal and her friend has surfaced. It adds a fresh twist to the case linked to the killing of businessman Ketan Agarwal, who was allegedly pushed from Pune's Lohagad Fort by Siya and her boyfriend Chetan.

Why Iran is preparing for 3,000 deaths at Ali Khamenei's funeralA German report claims Iranian authorities are making extensive preparations for possible mass casualties at Ali Khamenei's funeral in Tehran, reflecting concerns over past deadly stampedes at major state funerals in the country.

Australia probes online threat to PM Modi ahead of his Melbourne visitAn online comment threatening Prime Minister Narendra Modi ahead of his Melbourne visit has triggered a police probe in Australia.

sports.headline: Paraguay vs France live score and updates, FIFA World Cup 2026: Les Bleus look to make quick work of Paraguay Paraguay vs France live score and updates, FIFA World Cup 2026: France will look to book their place in the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals against a defensive-minded Paraguay, with Didier Deschamps handing Manu Kone a start in place of the injured Aurelien Tchouameni. The winners will face Morocco in the last eight.

I'd rather be us than them: Jesse Marsch defiant despite Canada's World Cup exit FIFA World Cup 2026: Canada's FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign ended with a 3-0 Round-of-16 defeat to Morocco, though Jesse Marsch praised his side's attacking intent despite the result. Morocco advanced to the quarter-finals after a strong second-half display that punished Canada's missed chances.

Morocco shakes off first-half slumber, ends Canada's dream run to reach quarters Canada vs Morocco, FIFA World Cup Round of 16: Azzedine Ounahi struck twice before Soufiane Rahimi added a late third as Morocco shook off a sluggish first half to beat Canada 3-0, ending the co-hosts' historic World Cup run and booking a second straight quarter-final berth.

Shreyas Iyer backs Ravi Bishnoi after costly meltdown in Manchester T20I ENG vs IND, 2nd T20I: Ravi Bishnoi had an off day after he leaked 29 runs in the 17th over India lost to England by four wickets on Sunday in Manchester to go 0-1 down in the series.

Iga Swiatek on shock exit after losing to Alexandra Eala: S**t happens Defending champion Iga Swiatek's Wimbledon title defence ended in stunning fashion after a straight-sets defeat to Alexandra Eala, with the Pole admitting that she struggled in the big moments.

Jacob Bethell spoils Sooryavanshi debut party, hands T20 champions third loss-in-a-row IND vs ENG: Jacob Bethell's unbeaten 76 took England past India's 190 in Manchester after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's record debut. The chase exposed India's middle-overs slowdown and gave England a 1-0 lead in the five-match series.

CAN 0-3 MAR Highlights: Morocco sink co-hosts Canada to advance to quarters Canada (CAN) vs Morocco (MAR) Highlights, FIFA World Cup: Despite Canada being the better side in Houston in the first-half, it's Morocco, who took the lead in Houston through Ounahi. The Moroccan's came out all guns blazing in the second half and late on broke away to triple their lead and put the match to bed.

Watch: Alexandra Eala cries tears of joy after biggest career win over Iga Swiatek Alexandra Eala broke down in tears after upsetting defending champion Iga Swiatek in the third round of Wimbledon to become the first Filipino to reach the fourth round of a Grand Slam.

Heartbroken Serena Williams opts out of Wimbledon doubles: Did everything I could Serena Williams has withdrawn from Wimbledon 2026 women's doubles, ending her planned reunion with Venus Williams. The knee injury has cut short a closely watched comeback, though Serena suggested it may not be her last appearance.

Iga Swiatek suffers shock Wimbledon exit as Alexandra Eala continues dream run Defending champion Iga Swiatek crashed out of Wimbledon 2026 after World No.32 Alexandra Eala stunned her 7-6(9), 6-2 in a third-round upset on Centre Court.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi promises, but falls cheaply in landmark India debut ENG vs IND, 2nd T20I: 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scored 14 runs off nine balls with two sixes before off-spinner Will Jacks dismissed him at the Old Trafford in Manchester.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi becomes India's youngest debutant at 15, beats SachinAt just 15 years, 3 months and 7 days, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the youngest player to make an international debut for India. Vaibhav received his maiden cap in the 2nd T20I against England.

Day 6 Highlights: Zverev advances, Anisimova, Swiatek, Rybakina crash outWimbledon Day 6 Highlights: Iga Swiatek has crashed out after losing to Alexandra Eala on Centre on Saturday. Elena Ryabakina has been knocked out after losing to Elise Mertens. Alexander Zverev advanced to the Round of 16, but Amanda Anisimova crashed out.

2nd T20I Highlights: England beat India by 4 wickets after Jacob Bethell 76India (IND) vs England (ENG) 2nd T20I Highlights in Manchester: Jacob Bethell scored an unbeaten 76 as England chased down 191 with six balls to spare at the Old Trafford in Manchester.

Grand Chess Tour: Praggnanandhaa storms into joint lead after in ZagrebR Praggnanandhaa won all three of his games on the final day of the rapid section to catch France's Alireza Firouzja at the top of the standings in the Croatia leg of the Grand Chess Tour. World champion D Gukesh slipped to fifth after drawing all three games.

FIDE bans Vladimir Kramnik for a year over unproven cheating allegationsFIDE suspended Vladimir Kramnik for at least one year over repeated public cheating allegations. He has rejected the ruling and will appeal as the body stresses evidence-based anti-cheating action.

Real Madrid coach reaches out to Cape Verde star after World Cup exploitsSidny Lopez Cabral revealed that Jose Mourinho personally texted him during Cape Verde's dream FIFA World Cup campaign, with the Real Madrid coach urging the midfielder to keep believing in himself.

If Sooryavanshi does not have a place in T20I team, tell him that: Parthiv PatelIndia have not handed young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi his national team debut just yet. Former cricketer Parthiv Patel believes it is critical to clearly communicate to the youngster what is going on and the process the team management is following.

England bank on secret weapon ahead of Round of 16 match vs Mexico: ViagraEngland could legally use Viagra to help cope with the high altitude in Mexico City ahead of their FIFA World Cup Round of 16 clash against co-hosts Mexico. While there is no indication the squad plans to use it, the medication is not prohibited by WADA and has previously been studied for its potential benefits in low-oxygen conditions.

Let Vaibhav Sooryavanshi debut in peaceEngland vs India: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's debut has become a daily debate before every India game, and it needs to stop. Morne Morkel's comments in Manchester show why the wait was never really about doubting the teenager, and why the noise around it does him no favours.

Cape Verde defenders leave Messi with bruised head. Pose for photos post-matchLionel Messi finished Argentina's hard-fought win over Cape Verde with a bruised forehead after a heavy collision with a defender. Moments later, the same Cape Verde players who had spent 120 minutes trying to stop him queued up for photographs with the Argentine legend.

India debut on the cards? Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's cryptic post fuels speculationVaibhav Sooryavanshi's Instagram post has sparked speculation that his India debut could come in the second T20I against England in Bristol on Saturday. After spending the first three matches of India's tour of the United Kingdom on the bench, the 15-year-old opener could finally be set for his senior cap.

Unbeaten Colombia edge Ghana 1-0, set up Switzerland clash in last 16Jhon Arias scored the only goal as Colombia beat Ghana 1-0 in Kansas City on Friday to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup Round of 16, where they will face Switzerland in Vancouver on Tuesday.

Argentina are not perfect. Messi details problems after tough win vs Cape VerdeLionel Messi's Argentina were forced to suffer through Extra Time against 64th ranked Cape Verde. Speaking after the game, Messi detailed the problems that Argentina faced on the pitch in their Round of 32 clash.

Cape Verde coach bows out of World Cup with head held high after Argentina lossCape Verde coach Bubista said he was immensely proud of his players after the tournament debutants pushed defending champions Argentina to the brink before suffering a 3-2 extra-time defeat in a gripping FIFA World Cup Round of 32 clash on July 4.

They had a 1 percent chance. Cape Verde just showed the world how massive that isFIFA World Cup 2026: The tiny island nation of 525,000 residents pushed Lionel Messi's world champions to the absolute limit in a five-goal Round of 32 thriller in Miami, proving that football's ultimate romance lies in defying the impossible.

Lionel Scaloni silences easy draw talk after Argentina survive Cape Verde scareFIFA World Cup: Argentina survived a fierce Cape Verde challenge to win 3-2 after extra time and reach the World Cup last 16. Lionel Scaloni said the contest showed there are no easy knockout matches and that his side emerged stronger.

Argentina survive fright of their lives against fearless Cabo Verde in Round of 32FIFA World Cup 2026: Argentina needed extra time to finally end Cabo Verde's remarkable World Cup fairytale, with the defending champions surviving a stirring fightback from the debutants to seal a dramatic 3-2 victory and book their place in the Round of 16.

COL 1-0 GHA Highlights: Unbeaten Colombia seal last-16 berthColombia (COL) vs Ghana (GHA) Highlights, FIFA World Cup: Colombia are through to the Round of 16 with a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Ghana. A first-half strike proved enough as Colombia withstood Ghana's late push to book their place in the next round, while Ghana's World Cup journey came to an end.

Ronaldo melts hearts with surprise invite to Venezuela earthquake survivorCristiano Ronaldo sent a personal video message to young Andres Mieles and invited him to a match. The gesture followed a social media campaign after the Venezuelan boy survived an earthquake that killed his family.

Raphinha returns as Rayan gives Brazil a selection callFIFA World Cup: Raphinha has returned to full training before Brazil's World Cup last-16 match against Norway. His comeback leaves Carlo Ancelotti weighing experience against Rayan's recent impact.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
